packages.title: Explore Bali Paradise
packages.description: Experience the beauty of Bali with pristine beaches, ancient temples, lush rice terraces, and unforgettable sunsets. Perfect for couples, families, and adventure seekers.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bali
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and leisure evening.

itinerary.title: Temple & Cultural Tour
itinerary.description: Visit famous temples and explore Balinese culture.

itinerary.title: Island Adventure
itinerary.description: Full-day Nusa Penida island sightseeing.

itinerary.title: Beach Activities
itinerary.description: Water sports and relaxing beach time.

itinerary.title: Shopping & Leisure
itinerary.description: Explore local markets and enjoy free time.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast and airport transfer.

packages.title: Dubai Luxury Escape
packages.description: Discover the glamour of Dubai with world-famous skyscrapers, luxurious shopping malls, thrilling desert adventures, and breathtaking waterfront attractions. Experience a perfect blend of modern architecture, rich culture, and unforgettable entertainment.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Dubai
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and evening visit to Dubai Marina.

itinerary.title: City Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Aquarium, and enjoy the fountain show.

itinerary.title: Desert Adventure
itinerary.description: Experience dune bashing, camel rides, cultural performances, and BBQ dinner.

itinerary.title: Palm Jumeirah & Leisure
itinerary.description: Explore Palm Jumeirah, Atlantis area, and enjoy shopping or optional activities.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and airport transfer.

packages.title: Romantic Paris Getaway
packages.description: Experience the timeless charm of Paris, where iconic landmarks, elegant boulevards, world-class museums, and delightful cafés create an unforgettable European holiday. Discover the perfect blend of romance, history, art, and culture in the City of Light.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Paris
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and an evening walk around the Eiffel Tower.

itinerary.title: Iconic Paris Landmarks
itinerary.description: Visit the Eiffel Tower, Arc de Triomphe, and enjoy shopping on Champs-Élysées.

itinerary.title: Art & History
itinerary.description: Explore the Louvre Museum and admire masterpieces including the Mona Lisa.

itinerary.title: Cultural Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Montmartre, Sacré-Cœur Basilica, and explore charming Parisian streets.

itinerary.title: Seine River & Leisure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a scenic Seine River cruise followed by free time for shopping and local cafés.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and airport transfer.

packages.title: Swiss Alps Adventure
packages.description: Escape to the breathtaking Swiss Alps and experience majestic snow-capped mountains, crystal-clear lakes, scenic train rides, and charming alpine villages. Perfect for nature lovers, adventure enthusiasts, and anyone seeking unforgettable mountain landscapes.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Interlaken
itinerary.description: Airport transfer, hotel check-in, and leisure walk through the beautiful town.

itinerary.title: Jungfraujoch Excursion
itinerary.description: Take the famous cogwheel train to Jungfraujoch and enjoy panoramic alpine views.

itinerary.title: Grindelwald Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Grindelwald village and enjoy optional mountain adventure activities.

itinerary.title: Lake Thun Cruise
itinerary.description: Relax on a scenic cruise across Lake Thun and visit nearby lakeside villages.

itinerary.title: Lauterbrunnen Valley Tour
itinerary.description: Explore picturesque waterfalls, charming villages, and breathtaking landscapes.

itinerary.title: Harder Kulm & Shopping
itinerary.description: Visit Harder Kulm viewpoint followed by free time for shopping and local cuisine.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to the airport.

packages.title: Maldives Island Retreat
packages.description: Escape to the tropical paradise of the Maldives, where turquoise lagoons, white sandy beaches, luxurious overwater villas, and vibrant coral reefs create the perfect island vacation. Relax, unwind, and experience world-class hospitality surrounded by breathtaking ocean views.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Malé
itinerary.description: Airport pickup by speedboat, resort check-in, and enjoy a relaxing evening by the beach.

itinerary.title: Ocean Adventure
itinerary.description: Snorkel through colorful coral reefs and discover diverse marine life in crystal-clear waters.

itinerary.title: Island Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit nearby islands, experience local culture, and enjoy water sports at the resort.

itinerary.title: Luxury & Relaxation
itinerary.description: Relax at the spa, enjoy the infinity pool, and end the day with a romantic sunset cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, resort checkout, and transfer to Malé International Airport.

packages.title: Singapore City Explorer
packages.description: Experience the vibrant city of Singapore, where futuristic architecture, lush gardens, cultural neighborhoods, and world-class attractions come together. Explore iconic landmarks, indulge in delicious cuisine, and enjoy a perfect blend of modern innovation and rich heritage.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Singapore
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and evening visit to Marina Bay waterfront.

itinerary.title: City Highlights
itinerary.description: Visit Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, and Gardens by the Bay.

itinerary.title: Sentosa Island
itinerary.description: Spend the day exploring Sentosa Island, beaches, and entertainment attractions.

itinerary.title: Universal Studios & Culture
itinerary.description: Enjoy thrilling rides at Universal Studios followed by visits to Chinatown and Little India.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and airport transfer.

packages.title: Thailand Island Adventure
packages.description: Explore the tropical beauty of Phuket with its crystal-clear waters, stunning limestone islands, lively beaches, and exciting adventure activities. From island hopping to vibrant nightlife and authentic Thai cuisine, this package offers the perfect balance of relaxation and excitement.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Phuket
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and relax at Patong Beach during the evening.

itinerary.title: Phi Phi Islands Tour
itinerary.description: Enjoy a full-day speedboat trip to the Phi Phi Islands with snorkeling and beach activities.

itinerary.title: James Bond Island
itinerary.description: Visit the famous James Bond Island and explore nearby caves and lagoons.

itinerary.title: City & Cultural Tour
itinerary.description: Explore Phuket Old Town, Big Buddha Temple, and local markets.

itinerary.title: Leisure & Entertainment
itinerary.description: Relax at the beach, enjoy optional water sports, and attend a traditional Thai cultural show.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to Phuket International Airport.

packages.title: Japan Cherry Blossom Journey
packages.description: Immerse yourself in the beauty and traditions of Japan as you explore Tokyo's futuristic skyline, historic temples, peaceful gardens, and breathtaking cherry blossom parks. Experience authentic Japanese culture, delicious cuisine, efficient transportation, and unforgettable sightseeing throughout this memorable journey.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Tokyo
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and evening walk around Shibuya.

itinerary.title: Tokyo City Tour
itinerary.description: Visit Tokyo Skytree, Asakusa, Senso-ji Temple, and Ueno Park.

itinerary.title: Mount Fuji Excursion
itinerary.description: Take a full-day guided trip to Mount Fuji and Lake Kawaguchi.

itinerary.title: Culture & Gardens
itinerary.description: Explore Meiji Shrine, Imperial Palace Gardens, and traditional Japanese neighborhoods.

itinerary.title: Shopping & Entertainment
itinerary.description: Spend the day in Akihabara, Ginza, and Shibuya for shopping and local experiences.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy free time for cafés, local cuisine, and optional attractions before a farewell dinner.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to the airport.

packages.title: Kerala Backwaters & Hill Escape
packages.description: Discover the serene beauty of Kerala with peaceful backwaters, lush tea plantations, misty hills, and vibrant local culture. Cruise through picturesque canals on a traditional houseboat, explore wildlife, and experience authentic South Indian hospitality throughout your unforgettable journey.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kochi
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and explore Fort Kochi and Marine Drive in the evening.

itinerary.title: Journey to Munnar
itinerary.description: Drive through scenic hills, waterfalls, and tea estates before checking into the resort.

itinerary.title: Munnar Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit tea plantations, Eravikulam National Park, and enjoy panoramic viewpoints.

itinerary.title: Periyar & Spice Gardens
itinerary.description: Explore Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary and visit famous spice plantations.

itinerary.title: Alleppey Backwaters
itinerary.description: Experience a traditional houseboat cruise with scenic backwater views and local cuisine.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to Kochi Airport.

packages.title: Kashmir Paradise Expedition
packages.description: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Kashmir, often called 'Paradise on Earth.' Cruise across the tranquil Dal Lake, stay in a traditional houseboat, explore colorful Mughal gardens, ride the famous Gulmarg Gondola, and witness snow-covered mountains, lush valleys, and charming local culture.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, check into a traditional houseboat, and enjoy a relaxing Shikara ride on Dal Lake.

itinerary.title: Srinagar City Tour
itinerary.description: Visit Mughal Gardens including Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Chashme Shahi.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg Adventure
itinerary.description: Travel to Gulmarg and enjoy the famous Gondola cable car with spectacular Himalayan views.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam Excursion
itinerary.description: Explore Betaab Valley, Aru Valley, and the scenic Lidder River surroundings.

itinerary.title: Local Markets & Leisure
itinerary.description: Shop for authentic Kashmiri handicrafts, dry fruits, saffron, and enjoy local cuisine.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and airport transfer for your onward journey.

packages.title: Goa Beach Bliss
packages.description: Enjoy the vibrant charm of Goa with its golden beaches, Portuguese heritage, lively nightlife, thrilling water sports, and delicious seafood. Relax by the Arabian Sea, explore historic churches, and experience the perfect combination of adventure and leisure in India's most popular beach destination.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Goa
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and spend the evening relaxing at Calangute Beach.

itinerary.title: North Goa Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Fort Aguada, Candolim Beach, Baga Beach, and enjoy exciting water sports.

itinerary.title: Dudhsagar Adventure
itinerary.description: Take a full-day trip to Dudhsagar Waterfalls and explore nearby spice plantations.

itinerary.title: South Goa Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Old Goa churches, Miramar Beach, Dona Paula, and enjoy a sunset cruise on the Mandovi River.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to Goa International Airport.

packages.title: Ladakh Himalayan Adventure
packages.description: Embark on an unforgettable adventure through the breathtaking landscapes of Ladakh. Witness snow-covered mountain passes, crystal-clear alpine lakes, ancient monasteries, and thrilling roads that make this Himalayan destination a paradise for nature lovers and adventure enthusiasts alike.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Leh
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and complete acclimatization with a relaxed evening.

itinerary.title: Leh Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Leh Palace, Shanti Stupa, Hall of Fame Museum, and explore the local market.

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley Journey
itinerary.description: Cross the famous Khardung La Pass and reach Nubra Valley for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Nubra Valley Exploration
itinerary.description: Enjoy a Bactrian camel safari at Hunder Sand Dunes and visit Diskit Monastery.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake Tour
itinerary.description: Travel to the stunning Pangong Lake and admire its ever-changing blue waters.

itinerary.title: Monastery Tour
itinerary.description: Visit Hemis Monastery, Thiksey Monastery, and Shey Palace before returning to Leh.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and airport transfer.

packages.title: Cappadocia Fairy Chimneys Escape
packages.description: Discover the magical landscapes of Cappadocia, famous for its fairy chimneys, ancient cave dwellings, colorful hot air balloons, and breathtaking valleys. Experience a unique blend of history, adventure, and natural beauty while exploring one of Turkey's most iconic destinations.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Cappadocia
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and enjoy a peaceful evening overlooking the fairy chimneys.

itinerary.title: Hot Air Balloon Experience
itinerary.description: Witness a spectacular sunrise during a hot air balloon ride followed by a guided city tour.

itinerary.title: Historical Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Göreme Open Air Museum, ancient cave churches, and local pottery workshops.

itinerary.title: Underground City Adventure
itinerary.description: Explore the fascinating underground city of Derinkuyu and nearby panoramic viewpoints.

itinerary.title: Valley Trek & Culture
itinerary.description: Hike through Red and Rose Valleys before enjoying a traditional Turkish music and dance performance.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to the airport.

packages.title: Santorini Sunset Romance
packages.description: Experience the breathtaking beauty of Santorini, where whitewashed cliffside villages, blue-domed churches, volcanic beaches, and unforgettable sunsets create the perfect Mediterranean getaway. Discover charming streets, indulge in authentic Greek cuisine, and relax with spectacular views of the Aegean Sea.
highlights: Red Beach & Black Sand Beach Visit
Wine Tasting at a Local Vineyard

itinerary.title: Arrival in Santorini
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and enjoy an evening stroll through Fira with panoramic sea views.

itinerary.title: Oia & Sunset Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the picturesque village of Oia, explore boutique shops, and witness Santorini's world-famous sunset.

itinerary.title: Caldera Cruise
itinerary.description: Sail around the volcanic caldera, swim in hot springs, and enjoy a delicious meal onboard.

itinerary.title: Beach & Vineyard Experience
itinerary.description: Relax at Red Beach and Black Sand Beach before visiting a traditional Santorini winery.

itinerary.title: Leisure & Local Exploration
itinerary.description: Spend the day exploring charming villages, local cafés, and souvenir markets at your own pace.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and airport transfer.

packages.title: Vietnam Heritage Discovery
packages.description: Explore the rich heritage and breathtaking landscapes of Vietnam as you journey through the vibrant streets of Hanoi, the limestone islands of Ha Long Bay, and centuries-old temples. Enjoy authentic Vietnamese cuisine, scenic cruises, bustling local markets, and unforgettable cultural experiences throughout this incredible adventure.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hanoi
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, hotel check-in, and evening exploration of the lively Old Quarter.

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Tour
itinerary.description: Visit Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, Temple of Literature, and Hoan Kiem Lake.

itinerary.title: Journey to Ha Long Bay
itinerary.description: Travel to Ha Long Bay and board a luxury cruise while enjoying the spectacular limestone islands.

itinerary.title: Ha Long Bay Exploration
itinerary.description: Explore caves, kayak through emerald waters, and return to Hanoi in the evening.

itinerary.title: Culture & Shopping
itinerary.description: Visit local markets, enjoy authentic Vietnamese cuisine, and attend a traditional water puppet show.

itinerary.title: Leisure Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy free time to explore cafés, museums, or shop for local handicrafts and souvenirs.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to Hanoi International Airport.

wishlist.description: Discover the glamour of Dubai with world-famous skyscrapers, luxurious shopping malls, thrilling desert adventures, and breathtaking waterfront attractions. Experience a perfect blend of modern architecture, rich culture, and unforgettable entertainment.
